title: staelia lanigera
intro: Staelia lanigera, also known as the woolly Staelia, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Staelia lanigera include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
